app.title: Daily Sudoku
app.description: Play one shared Sudoku puzzle every day. New puzzle at midnight Brazil time.

gameOver.title: Game Over
gameOver.subtitle: You made 3 mistakes. Better luck tomorrow!

globalStats.noData: Not enough players yet — be one of the first!
globalStats.noStreaks: No streaks yet — start yours today!

leaderboard.fastestToday: You're the fastest to complete Sudoku #{{number}} so far!

practice.overlayDescription: Sharpen your skills with an easier puzzle — more numbers are filled in so games are quicker. No mistake limit, so you can experiment freely!
practice.completeSubtitle: Great job! Ready for the daily challenge?
practice.leaveDescription: Your progress on this practice puzzle will be lost if you go back to the daily challenge.

menu.title: Menu
menu.signInHint: Sign in to carry your streak and stats across devices.
menu.authUnavailable: Sign-in is not available — server is not configured.

seo.howToPlay1: Click or tap a cell to select it.
seo.howToPlay2: Type a number from 1 to 9 (or tap a number on the pad) to fill it in.
seo.howToPlay3: Use Notes mode (pencil button) to jot down candidate numbers in a cell.
seo.howToPlay4: Press Backspace or the Erase button to remove a number.
seo.howToPlay5: Fill every cell so each row, column, and 3×3 box contains the digits 1–9 exactly once.
seo.whatIsDailyTitle: What is Sudoku of the Day?
seo.whatIsDailyBody: Sudoku of the Day gives every player worldwide the exact same puzzle each day. The puzzle is generated from the current date so it resets automatically at midnight Brazil time (America/São_Paulo). No account is required — your progress and streak are saved locally in your browser. Compete with friends, compare solve times, and build your daily habit.
seo.rules1: Every row must contain the digits 1 through 9 with no repetition.
seo.rules2: Every column must contain the digits 1 through 9 with no repetition.
seo.rules3: Each of the nine 3×3 boxes must contain the digits 1 through 9 with no repetition.
seo.rules4: You have a maximum of 3 mistakes. A fourth mistake ends the game.
seo.faq1q: Is today's puzzle the same for everyone?
seo.faq1a: Yes. The puzzle is seeded by the date in Brazil's time zone, so every player in the world gets the same grid on the same day.
seo.faq2q: Do I need to create an account?
seo.faq2a: No. The game works entirely without an account. Your streak and progress are stored in your browser. Sign in with Google only if you want to sync across devices.
seo.faq3q: When does the new puzzle appear?
seo.faq3a: A fresh puzzle appears every day at midnight Brazil time (UTC-3). You will see a countdown timer once you complete or fail the current puzzle.
seo.faq4q: What happens if I make 3 mistakes?
seo.faq4a: The game ends after 3 mistakes. You can watch an ad to earn one extra chance, or wait for tomorrow's puzzle.
seo.tip1: Start with the numbers that appear most often in the given clues — they leave fewer open positions.
seo.tip2: Use pencil marks to track candidates in empty cells before committing to a number.
seo.tip3: Scan rows, columns, and boxes for the only possible position of a digit (hidden single technique).
seo.tip4: Fast-fill mode lets you lock in a digit and click all its remaining positions in one go.

account.title: Account
account.usernameLocked: Your name is assigned automatically and can't be changed.

shop.title: Shop
shop.streakFreezeDesc: Protects your streak if you miss a day. Max 2.
shop.undoTokenDesc: Cancels one mistake during a daily puzzle.
